mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bookings ( booking_number, user_id, product_id, name, phone, email, adult_count, child_count, infant_count, desired_departure_at, request_memo, status, admin_checked, payment_status, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{bookingNumber}, #{userId}, #{req.productId}, #{req.name}, #{req.phone}, #{req.email}, #{req.adultCount}, #{req.childCount}, #{req.infantCount}, #{req.desiredDepartureAt}, #{req.requestMemo}, 'PENDING', false, 'UNPAID', NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT b.booking_id, b.booking_number, b.user_id, u.login_id AS user_login_id, b.product_id, p.product_name, b.name, b.phone, b.email, b.adult_count, b.child_count, b.infant_count, b.desired_departure_at, b.total_price, b.request_memo, b.status, b.admin_memo, b.admin_checked, b.payment_status, b.payment_method, b.paid_amount, b.paid_at, b.pg_transaction_id, b.created_at, b.updated_at FROM bookings b LEFT JOIN users u ON b.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN products p ON b.product_id = p.product_id WHERE b.booking_id = #{bookingId}
mapper.update: UPDATE bookings SET payment_status = #{paymentStatus}, payment_method = #{paymentMethod}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE booking_id = #{bookingId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bookings WHERE admin_checked = false
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(adult_count + child_count + infant_count), 0) FROM bookings WHERE status = 'PENDING'
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(adult_count + child_count + infant_count), 0) FROM bookings WHERE status = 'CONFIRMED'
SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM bookings GROUP BY status

SELECT payment_status, COUNT(*) AS cnt, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE payment_method = 'MANUAL') AS manual_cnt, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE payment_method = 'ONLINE') AS online_cnt FROM bookings GROUP BY payment_status

SELECT p.product_name, COUNT(*) AS cnt, COALESCE(c1.category_name, c2.category_name) AS root_category_name FROM bookings b JOIN products p ON b.product_id = p.product_id JOIN categories c2 ON p.category_id = c2.category_id LEFT JOIN categories c1 ON c2.parent_id = c1.category_id GROUP BY p.product_id, p.product_name, root_category_name ORDER BY cnt DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE bookings SET adult_count = #{req.adultCount}, child_count = #{req.childCount}, infant_count = #{req.infantCount}, desired_departure_at = #{req.desiredDepartureAt}, request_memo = #{req.requestMemo}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE booking_id = #{bookingId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'PENDING'
mapper.select: SELECT b.booking_id, b.booking_number, b.user_id, u.login_id AS user_login_id, b.product_id, p.product_name, b.name, b.phone, b.email, b.adult_count, b.child_count, b.infant_count, b.desired_departure_at, b.total_price, b.request_memo, b.status, b.admin_memo, b.admin_checked, b.payment_status, b.payment_method, b.paid_amount, b.paid_at, b.pg_transaction_id, b.created_at, b.updated_at FROM bookings b LEFT JOIN users u ON b.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN products p ON b.product_id = p.product_id WHERE b.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY b.created_at DESC
